Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Codi Dada appeared in person for Chester Joseph Jr. and Ronald Paul Joseph (proposed executors).
Caorline Daniels appeared in person (pro/per).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 04, 2002 is admitted to probate. Chester Joseph Jr. and Ronald Paul Joseph are appointed as the Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To Mar-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Codia Dada, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Chester Joseph and Ronald Jospeh, Petitioners.

Carolyn Ruth McDaniels, in court, Objector.

At the outset, Ms. McDaniels states that she is appearing to object to the instant petition and that she plans to consult with and attorney.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Mar-24-204 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. McDaniels is instructed to file a formal objection by Mar-15-2024.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
